'''鈭歭-g-th''' ('''lagatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monomialize|monomialize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monomialize|monomialize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-g-th
|-
! Lemma
| lagatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lagathithi|lagathithi]] || [[word:lagathiji|lagathiji]] || [[word:lagathishi|lagathishi]] || [[word:lagathi|lagathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lagathuthuth|lagathuthuth]] || [[word:lagathujuj|lagathujuj]] || [[word:lagathushush|lagathushush]] || [[word:lagath|lagath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lagathuthu|lagathuthu]] || [[word:lagathuju|lagathuju]] || [[word:lagathushu|lagathushu]] || [[word:lagathu|lagathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lagathufuth|lagathufuth]] || [[word:lagathufuj|lagathufuj]] || [[word:lagathufush|lagathufush]] || [[word:lagathuf|lagathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lagathethe|lagathethe]] || [[word:lagatheje|lagatheje]] || [[word:lagatheshe|lagatheshe]] || [[word:lagathe|lagathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lagathothoth|lagathothoth]] || [[word:lagathojoj|lagathojoj]] || [[word:lagathoshosh|lagathoshosh]] || [[word:lagath|lagath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lagathotho|lagathotho]] || [[word:lagathojo|lagathojo]] || [[word:lagathosho|lagathosho]] || [[word:lagatho|lagatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lagathofoth|lagathofoth]] || [[word:lagathofoj|lagathofoj]] || [[word:lagathofosh|lagathofosh]] || [[word:lagathof|lagathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lagath忙th忙|lagath忙th忙]] || [[word:lagath忙j忙|lagath忙j忙]] || [[word:lagath忙sh忙|lagath忙sh忙]] || [[word:lagath忙|lagath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lagathathath|lagathathath]] || [[word:lagathajaj|lagathajaj]] || [[word:lagathashash|lagathashash]] || [[word:lagath|lagath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lagathatha|lagathatha]] || [[word:lagathaja|lagathaja]] || [[word:lagathasha|lagathasha]] || [[word:lagatha|lagatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lagathafath|lagathafath]] || [[word:lagathafaj|lagathafaj]] || [[word:lagathafash|lagathafash]] || [[word:lagathaf|lagathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lagathasha|lagathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golagathasha|golagathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilagathasha|gokilagathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lagathn眉sha|lagathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golagathnkn眉sha|golagathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilagathn眉sha|gokilagathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lagathsh毛sha|lagathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golagathnksh毛sha|golagathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilagathsh毛sha|gokilagathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagathrosha|lagathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagathnkrosha|golagathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagathrosha|gokilagathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lagathmusha|lagathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golagathnkmusha|golagathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagathmusha|gokilagathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lagathsherasha|lagathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golagathnksherasha|golagathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilagathsherasha|gokilagathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lagathngasha|lagathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golagathnkngasha|golagathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilagathngasha|gokilagathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lagathyasha|lagathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golagathnkyasha|golagathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilagathyasha|gokilagathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lagathyamasha|lagathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golagathnkyamasha|golagathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilagathyamasha|gokilagathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lagathn眉sh毛sha|lagathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golagathnkn眉sh毛sha|golagathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilagathn眉sh毛sha|gokilagathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagathn眉rosha|lagathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagathnkn眉rosha|golagathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagathn眉rosha|gokilagathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagathn眉musha|lagathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagathnkn眉musha|golagathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagathn眉musha|gokilagathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lagathsh毛n眉sha|lagathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golagathnksh毛n眉sha|golagathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilagathsh毛n眉sha|gokilagathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagathsh毛rosha|lagathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagathnksh毛rosha|golagathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagathsh毛rosha|gokilagathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagathsh毛musha|lagathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagathnksh毛musha|golagathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagathsh毛musha|gokilagathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lagathron眉sha|lagathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golagathnkron眉sha|golagathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilagathron眉sha|gokilagathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lagathrosh毛sha|lagathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golagathnkrosh毛sha|golagathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilagathrosh毛sha|gokilagathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagathromusha|lagathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagathnkromusha|golagathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagathromusha|gokilagathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lagathmun眉sha|lagathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golagathnkmun眉sha|golagathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilagathmun眉sha|gokilagathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lagathmush毛sha|lagathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golagathnkmush毛sha|golagathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilagathmush毛sha|gokilagathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagathmurosha|lagathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagathnkmurosha|golagathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagathmurosha|gokilagathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lagath|lagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:l忙g忙th|l忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holagath|holagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hol忙g忙th|hol忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholagath|hoholagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohol忙g忙th|hohol忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉lagath|n眉lagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉l忙g忙th|n眉l忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉lagath|n眉n眉lagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉l忙g忙th|n眉n眉l忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂lagath|n茂lagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂l忙g忙th|n茂l忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂lagath|n茂n茂lagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂l忙g忙th|n茂n茂l忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulagath|lulagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lul忙g忙th|lul忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululagath|lululagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulul忙g忙th|lulul忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilagath|lilagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lil忙g忙th|lil忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililagath|lililagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilil忙g忙th|lilil忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolagath|kolagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kol忙g忙th|kol忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolagath|kokolagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokol忙g忙th|kokol忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelagath|kelagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kel忙g忙th|kel忙g忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelagath|kekelagath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekel忙g忙th|kekel忙g忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
